hooks.command: if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && files=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -4 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && branch=$(git branch --show-current) && git commit -m "auto-save: $files" && git push origin "$branch" && echo "[auto-commit] pushed: $files"; fi
